headline: CEO Ogilvy UK / Founder New Commercial Arts.

experiences.title: CEO
experiences.description: James Murphy is CEO of Ogilvy Group UK, which includes both Ogilvy UK and NCA.

experiences.title: Founder, CEO
experiences.description:
Founder of adam&eve.
5 x Campaign Agency of the Year (2010, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017)
2 x Cannes Lions Agency of the Year (2014, 2018)
3 x IPA Effectiveness Grand Prix (2012, 2014, 2016)
1 x Gunn Report Most Creative Agency in the World (2017)
1 x WARC Most Effective Agency in the World (2017)
